issues.name: DNS Record Published

issues.name: SOA Serial Number
issues.description: Serial does not match recommended YYYYMMDDnn format (e.g., 2024010101).
issues.recommendation: Update serial to YYYYMMDDnn standard.

issues.name: DMARC External Auth
issues.description: Target domain my1791financialservicespro.com has NOT authorized records from 1791financialserviceshq.com. Reports may be ignored.
issues.recommendation: Add TXT record at 1791financialserviceshq.com._report._dmarc.my1791financialservicespro.com with value "v=DMARC1".
